description: Quad mesh is a component that generates mesh data procedurally that makes a flat 2D square.

fields.Rotation: How to rotate the quad in local space.
fields.Size: The size of the quad in local space.
fields.UVOffset: The added offset to the UVs.
fields.UVScale: The scale of the UVs from the bottom left.
fields.ScaleUVWithSize: Whether to scale uv mapping with ``Size``
fields.DualSided: Whether to make a second pair of triangles that are visible from the opposite side.
fields.UseVertexColors: Whether to use vertex colors which can be read by materials.

usage: Attach to a slot and insert into a Mesh Renderer with a material to view it.
